API & Node SDK

Integrate the Digital Will Protocol directly into your own wallets, family office portals, or wealth management software.

Installation

npm install @digitalwill/protocol-sdk

Initialize the Decentralized Vault

import { DigitalWill } from '@digitalwill/protocol-sdk';// Initialize with Web3 Provider (e.g., MetaMask, WalletConnect)const protocol = new DigitalWill({ web3Provider: window.ethereum, network: 'polygon-mainnet', storage: 'web3.storage'});// Connect and authenticate via EIP-4361 (Sign-In with Ethereum)await protocol.connect();

Encrypt & Shard a Private Key

// Local encryption and mathematical generation of Shamir sharesconst payload = await protocol.assets.securePayload({ type: 'PRIVATE_KEY', data: '0x...', nominees: ['0xRecipientWalletAddress...'], threshold: 3, totalShares: 5 });// Will automatically pin the cipher-blob to IPFS and route the isolated key-shardsconsole.log(payload.ipfsCid);
